seo.title: Healthcare Cleaners London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: DBS-checked healthcare cleaners trained in infection prevention for care homes, hospitals, and supported living across London. Same-day and emergency cover available.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.sub: Vigil Care Staffing supplies DBS-checked cleaning staff, trained in infection prevention, to care homes, clinics and supported living services across Greater London.
fields.heading: Healthcare Cleaners in London
fields.image_alt: Healthcare cleaner in uniform disinfecting a clinical room in a London care setting

fields.body:
Clean, hygienic environments are central to safe care. Healthcare cleaners keep clinical and residential spaces safe by following infection prevention and control routines that go well beyond general cleaning. Vigil Care Staffing supplies experienced healthcare cleaning staff to care homes, clinics, supported living services and similar settings across Greater London.

Our cleaners are trained to NHS cleaning standards and understand the demands of care environments, from colour-coded equipment and correct use of products to safe waste handling and high-touch-point routines. We provide cover for planned rota gaps, short-notice absence and additional deep-cleaning needs.

Vigil Care Staffing is a staffing supplier. Our role is to give your service dependable, vetted cleaning staff who are ready to work and understand infection control from their first shift.
fields.heading: Infection-control cleaning staff for care settings

items.body: Our cleaners are trained to NHS cleaning standards and follow infection prevention and control routines suited to care environments. Hygiene is treated as part of safe care, not an afterthought.
items.title: Infection-control trained

items.body: Every healthcare cleaner is DBS-checked, reference-verified and confirmed eligible to work before being placed with your service.
items.title: Fully vetted staff

items.body: We keep a local pool of available cleaning staff so short-notice and same-day gaps can be filled quickly, keeping your spaces safe and compliant.
items.title: Rapid cover

items.body: Book routine cleaning shifts, additional deep-cleaning support or ongoing cover to suit your service and its schedule.
items.title: Flexible arrangements

items.body: Our cleaners understand the practical realities of residential, clinical and supported-living spaces, and work around residents and daily routines.
items.title: Care-setting experience

items.body: Our cleaning staff are directly employed by Vigil Care Staffing, so vetting and training records stay with us throughout every placement.
items.title: Directly employed

fields.body:
Every healthcare cleaner completes an enhanced DBS check, right-to-work verification and reference checks before their first shift. Cleaning staff are trained to NHS cleaning standards and in infection prevention and the safe handling of cleaning products, with training kept current through ongoing development.

Our recruitment follows a CQC-compliant process that helps support your own hygiene and safe-staffing evidence. Because our cleaning staff are directly employed, responsibility for their vetting and conduct stays with us throughout every placement.
fields.heading: Trained, vetted and compliance-ready

items.a: We supply healthcare cleaners to care and clinical settings across Greater London. Tell us your location and we will confirm availability near you.
We hold a local pool of available cleaning staff and respond quickly to short-notice and same-day requests, always confirming what we can cover.
items.q: How quickly can you provide cover?

items.a: Our cleaners are trained to NHS cleaning standards and in infection prevention, with DBS checks and references completed before they start.
items.q: What training do your healthcare cleaners have?

items.a: Yes. We supply staff for routine cleaning shifts, additional deep-cleaning support and ongoing rota cover, so you can scale up or down as needed.
items.q: Can you supply both routine and deep-cleaning staff?

locations.label: Care home CPD and CQC compliance

fields.sub: Tell us your requirements and we will match vetted, infection-control-trained cleaners to your setting across Greater London.
fields.heading: Need trained healthcare cleaning staff?
